notes: Twice-daily Reads run (second of 2026-07-08, finalized 2026-07-09 UTC). Surveyed 9 candidates, picked 4 (teardown/chronicle/primer/dispatch across ai-tech, history-geography, science, geopolitics). Published 2: homo-naledi-deliberate-burial (primer) and sardis-birthplace-of-coined-money (chronicle) — both PASS on re-verify, deterministic gate 2/2 ok, clean real build (build-resilient, 0 quarantined). INFRA NOTE: all deterministic verify gates initially false-FAILed at ~15pct grounding due to a pipeline-wide ledger bug — CitationLedgerEntrySchema.firstSeen requires z.string().datetime() (full ISO), but the researcher skill reference example and all writers emit date-only (2026-07-08), so readLedgerFile silently drops every entry. Worked around by normalizing the ephemeral (uncommitted) per-slug ledgers to ISO datetime; recommend a real fix at packages/core/src/citation-ledger.ts (accept date-only) or the researcher skill example + writer output.

notes: Second run 2026-07-09/10. Survey slate 9; picked 4 (teardown/chronicle/primer/dispatch). Published: hazard-ratios-not-risks (primer, data-science/science) + africa-drone-wars-doctrine (dispatch, geopolitics) — both PASS gates + clean build-resilient, no quarantines. PIPELINE BUG surfaced by all four verifiers: writers emit date-only firstSeen (2026-07-09) but CitationLedgerEntrySchema requires z.string().datetime() (full ISO), so readLedgerFile silently drops every ledger entry and generate verify false-negatives grounding on every slug. Worked around by normalizing firstSeen to full ISO datetime in the per-slug ledgers; underlying schema-vs-writer drift in packages/core/src/citation-ledger.ts vs writers/researcher SKILL.md still needs a code fix (out of this routine scope).
